channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Instructions for accessing the Moorabbin weather article
item.description: The article explains that users may encounter a block message when accessing the Moorabbin weather content. News Corp Australia uses automated systems to manage crawler bot traffic. If users are not b...

item.title: Nawaz Sharif pledges development plans for AJK if PML-N wins elections
item.description: Pakistan Muslim League-Nawaz (PML-N) President Nawaz Sharif has pledged to prioritize Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) development if his party wins upcoming elections. Speaking to party workers in Muzaff...

item.title: President William Ruto Supports Grassroots Football Tournament in Kilgoris
item.description: President William Ruto recently visited his private Kilgoris farm to support a grassroots football tournament organized by his son, George Ruto. The event, held at the Intonnah Farm, attracted 24 team...

item.title: UST and Benilde advance in Shakey’s Collegiate Volleyball Tournament
item.description: The University of Santo Tomas (UST) and the College of Saint Benilde (Benilde) have made significant strides in the Shakey’s Collegiate National Invitationals (Shakey’s) volleyball tournament. UST’s v...

item.title: B.C. Conservatives raise concerns over southern pipeline route's impact on farmland
item.description: The article details how British Columbia's Conservative Party is voicing opposition to the proposed Alberta-Ottawa pipeline route passing through the fertile Fraser Valley. MLA Robyn Paton highlights ...

item.title: Ed Harris Expresses Dissatisfaction With Role In Dutton Ranch
item.description: Ed Harris, an Oscar-nominated actor known for roles in films such as The Truman Show and Apollo 13, has expressed frustration over his portrayal in the Yellowstone spinoff series Dutton Ranch. During ...

item.title: California Seeks Enhanced Collaboration to Combat Sex Trafficking
item.description: Governor Gavin Newsom has issued an executive order requiring state agencies to develop a coordinated anti-trafficking strategy within 60 days, addressing systemic failures in combating sex traffickin...

item.title: Christopher Nolan's Film Captures the Flawed Heroism of Homer's Odysseus
item.description: The article examines how Christopher Nolan's 2005 film 'Odyssey' reimagines Homer's Odysseus as a complex, flawed hero rather than a traditional archetype. It critiques the 'hero's journey' narrative,...

item.title: Grace Ekirapa and Daughter AJ Showcase Matching Outfits in Joyful Fashion Moment
item.description: Grace Ekirapa and her daughter AJ, who she co-parents with Pascal Tokodi, made headlines after posting a TikTok video of them wearing matching green sequined and beaded outfits. The video, filmed indo...

item.title: Northwestern Ontario Faces 140 Active Wildfires and Evacuation Alerts
item.description: As of Monday evening, 140 active wildfires are burning across northwestern Ontario, with 47 fires not under control and evacuation alerts in effect for several communities. The largest fire, Thunder B...

item.title: Russian comedian Sasha Nezlobin flees Putin's regime after anti-war comments, performs at Edinburgh Fringe
item.description: Sasha Nezlobin, a prominent Russian sitcom star, has fled Moscow to escape the authoritarian rule of President Vladimir Putin following his public criticism of Russia’s war with Ukraine. The comedian,...

item.title: Kenyans protest US workers' Ebola quarantine in Kenya despite court ban
item.description: Kenyans are expressing outrage over the quarantine of US workers in Kenya for Ebola, despite a court order banning the establishment of a US-backed quarantine centre. The US humanitarian organisation ...

item.title: Ryan Reynolds Teases Potential New Deadpool Film Focusing on Unexplored Comic Storylines
item.description: During a panel at Fanatics Fest, Ryan Reynolds confirmed that there will eventually be another Deadpool movie, though it may explore lesser-known comic book storylines. The actor mentioned that severa...

item.title: Essential Skills for Navigating Change in Australian Businesses
item.description: The article explores the critical skills required for successful change management in Australian businesses amid rapid technological and workplace transformations. It emphasizes that while planning is...

item.title: Nawaz Sharif Launches PML-N Election Campaign in AJK with Development Promises
item.description: PML-N supremo Nawaz Sharif formally launched the party's election campaign in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK), emphasizing development initiatives and infrastructure projects. The campaign began with Naw...

item.title: Analysis of 2026 Midterm Elections: Candidates Must Embrace Boldness to Challenge Trump and MAGA
item.description: The article discusses the 2026 U.S. midterm elections, emphasizing the need for candidates to adopt a more confrontational and bold approach to challenge President Trump and the MAGA movement. It crit...

item.title: Heroes of the 2026 World Cup: From Spain to Cape Verde
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup saw a mix of iconic moments and underdog stories that defined the tournament. Spain's victory, led by Rodri's tactical brilliance and Ferran Torres' late-game heroics, capped o...

item.title: FIFA investigates post-match brawl after Spain's World Cup victory over Argentina
item.description: FIFA has launched an investigation into a chaotic post-match brawl that erupted after Spain's 1-0 extra-time victory over Argentina in the World Cup final. The incident occurred following Spain's seco...

item.title: Mindanao Military Leaders Appointed to Key AFP Roles, Boost Peace Initiatives
item.description: The Philippine Army and Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) have appointed Lt. Gen. Donald Gumiran and Lt. Gen. Antonio Nafarrete as their new commanders and chief of staff, respectively. Both offic...

item.title: Premiers Address Trade Concerns and Major Projects Amid U.S. Tariff Threats
item.description: Canada's provincial premiers are convening in Prince Edward Island to address key economic issues, including domestic trade barriers and major infrastructure projects, amid renewed tariff threats from...
